metadata.dispatch_line: Possible stalking in progress at 1457 Mango Street, report of a female being followed by a male suspect near the residence of Maya Ramos

scenario.dispatch_line: Possible stalking in progress at 1457 Mango Street, report of a female being followed by a male suspect near the residence of Maya Ramos

facts.stalking_01: Call recorded at 02:45 AM, incident occurred at 02:30 AM, dispatch at 02:40 AM, and arrival at 02:50 AM
facts.stalking_02: Victim, Maria Rodriguez, and suspect, Jake Lee, are former romantic partners
facts.stalking_03: History of relationship includes 5 incidents of physical violence, 10 incidents of intimidation, and 15 incidents of threats over the past year
facts.stalking_04: Stalking behaviors include following, repeated calling, and sending unwanted gifts to Maria's workplace
facts.stalking_05: Valid protection order in place, verified by Officer Johnson at 03:10 AM
facts.stalking_06: Witnesses, Emily Chen and David Kim, interviewed and documented at 03:20 AM
facts.stalking_07: Previous incidents documented, including a January 10th incident where Jake showed up at Maria's workplace uninvited
facts.stalking_08: Evidence collected includes a torn piece of fabric near the scene and a security camera footage
facts.stalking_09: Electronic evidence collected includes 20 text messages and 5 phone calls from Jake's phone to Maria's phone
facts.stalking_10: All incidents of stalking behavior on Maria's cell phone and computer captured and documented
facts.stalking_11: Scene described as a residential area with a parking lot, and a diagram of the scene is attached to the report
facts.stalking_12: No weapons or objects used, but a rock was found near the scene with a threatening message
facts.stalking_13: Victim, Maria, was in a state of panic, thinking 'I'm going to die' and feeling extremely scared and helpless
facts.stalking_14: Evidence of fear includes Maria's shaking hands and tearful statements
facts.stalking_15: Threats clearly documented, including 'I'll kill you if you don't take me back'
facts.stalking_16: Use of coercion and/or force articulated, including Jake's history of physical violence
facts.stalking_17: Injuries documented include a bruise on Maria's left arm and a scratch on her right cheek
facts.stalking_18: Property damage documented, including a broken window at Maria's residence
facts.stalking_19: Photos taken of the scene, including the rock with the threatening message, and details recorded
facts.stalking_20: Victim reported being strangled by Jake on January 10th, with difficulty breathing and a raspy voice
facts.stalking_21: Victim's need for medical attention documented, and EMS was summoned at 03:30 AM
facts.stalking_22: Spontaneous statements captured, including 'He's going to kill me' and 'I'm so scared'
facts.stalking_23: Elements of the stalking crime thoroughly articulated, including the pattern of behavior and the intent to harass
facts.stalking_24: Victim's safety planning documented, including a plan to stay with a friend and to vary her daily routine
facts.stalking_25: Information about obtaining an order of protection provided to the victim, including the process and the benefits
facts.stalking_26: Information about local service providers supplied to the victim, including the National Domestic Violence Hotline
facts.stalking_27: Threat/risk assessment tool utilized with the victim, including the Danger Assessment Tool
facts.stalking_28: Use of a stalking kit and/or stalking log discussed with the victim, including a log to track Jake's behavior
facts.stalking_29: Suspect's access to weapons documented, including a rifle and a handgun registered in his name, and noted that confiscation is pending warrant due to the suspect not being present at the scene
facts.stalking_30: Emotional state of the suspect unable to be determined as he was not present at the scene
facts.stalking_31: Suspect's history of protection orders includes a previous order in 2018
facts.stalking_32: Suspect prohibited from possessing firearms due to a conviction for a misdemeanor crime of domestic violence in 2015 and the valid protection order in place
facts.stalking_33: Active warrant out for the suspect, including a warrant for a previous incident of stalking

interview_transcript.content: Hi. So someone was following you? Can you tell me what happened?

(nervously) Oh, yeah... I think it was my ex, Jake. We used to date, but it didn't end well. He's been following me, calling me, and sending me gifts at work. It's been really scary. Tonight was the worst, though. I was at home, and I saw him outside my window around 2:30 AM. I'm pretty sure it was him. I didn't see his face, but... (pausing, taking a deep breath) I just knew it was him. I got really scared and called 911. (starting to tear up) I was so afraid he was going to come in and hurt me.
Do you know this Jake's last name? And where does he live?

(shaking slightly) His last name is Lee. Jake Lee. I'm not really sure where he lives now, though. We used to live together, but after we broke up, I don't know... he might still be at the same place, but I'm not sure. I've been trying to avoid him, you know? (nervously chuckling) I don't really want to know where he is, to be honest. But I think you might already know some of this, right? I mean, there's a protection order in place... (trailing off, looking unsure)
Okay got it. When did this stalking start, roughly?

(thinking, trying to composed herself) I think it started... after we broke up. That was about a year ago, I guess. At first, it was just him calling me and showing up at my work, trying to talk to me. But then it escalated. He started sending me gifts and following me. It's been getting worse and worse over the past few months. (pausing, looking down) There have been times when he's been violent, too. He's hurt me before... (her voice cracking) like on January 10th, when he showed up at my work and... (taking a deep breath) and choked me. That's when I got the protection order.

narrative:
INCIDENT REPORT - STALKING
Date: 04/28/2026
Officer: Smith

On the above date I responded to 1457 Mango Street regarding a stalking complaint. I spoke with the victim Maria Rodriguez who stated that her ex-boyfriend Jake Lee has been following her and calling her. She also mentioned he showed up outside her window at around 2:30 AM. She said this has been going on for about a year. There is a protection order in place. Suspect not on scene at time of arrival. Report filed.
